title: allamanda cathartica var. hendersonii
intro: Allamanda cathartica var. hendersonii, also known as the yellow allamanda or Henderson's allamanda, is a flowering plant native to Madagascar, characterized by its bright yellow trumpet-shaped flowers. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be attributed to the presence of alkaloids and glycosides. The health benefits of Allamanda cathartica var. hendersonii include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an anti-asthmatic agent. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal purposes, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity and interactions with other medications.
